name: Fruit Fluff
recipeIngredient: 170 g can Carnation evaporated milk, chilled
225 g fresh strawberries, blackberries or raspberries -- hulled
fresh berries and mint sprigs -- to decorate
recipeInstructions:
1. Whisk the Carnation Milk until doubled in volume. Whisk in the sugar. Puree the fruit, then strain to remove the seeds. Stir in the Greek yogurt and fruit puree, reserving 1 tbsp of the puree for decoration.
2. Spoon the fruit fluff into glasses. Create a rippled effect on top with the reserved puree. Chill and decorate with berries and mint sprigs.
